summary:
We've ranked Blueberry Funded as the 3rd best prop firm worldwide with an overall score of 93/100. It's a great option for crypto, stock, and forex trading, and they now also offer three instant funding accounts (Instant Lite, Instant Elite, and Instant Pro). Pricing all comes from forex broker Blueberry Markets, and fees are competitive as well, starting from just $25. Profit splits start at 80% and can increase to 90% through the scaling plan.

Blueberry Funded scored 93/100 during testing, placing third overall in our 2026 prop firm rankings. This score reflects the full experience, from signup and platform access to challenge rules, trading conditions, and payout speed. It scored 9.5/10 for Challenges thanks to low fees and a great range of different evaluation processes, including the Synthetics Challenge – a unique option built for trading custom volatility indices. It also earned a perfect 10/10 for Markets and Leverage, offering access to over 1,100 instruments across forex, crypto, and equities.
pros: Crypto and stock CFD trading available (stocks via Stock Challenge)
cons: News trading prohibited (2-minute restriction around high-impact events)
Limited payment options (crypto only for payouts)
bestFor: Traders who want diverse market access (crypto, stocks, synthetics) with broker-backed pricing and low entry fees
notIdealFor: Traders who need unrestricted news trading or a wide range of withdrawal options

categorySections.challenges:
Blueberry Funded offers one of the most diverse selections of challenges – three instant funding options, one and two step evaluations, plus rapid and synthetic accounts.

The **2 Step Challenge** runs across two phases, with a 10% target in Step One and a 5% target in Step Two. Daily loss limit is 5% and overall drawdown cap is 10%, both static. Minimum 3 active trading days required. The **1 Step Challenge** requires a 10% target with a 6% total and 4% daily drawdown. The **Rapid Challenge** has no minimum trading days during evaluation but requires at least 3 active trading days once funded, with a 5% target and 3% daily / 4% trailing total drawdown.

**Instant Lite** skips evaluation with a 2% daily and 4% total drawdown, requiring 5 minimum active trading days. **Instant Elite** also skips evaluation with no daily drawdown limit and a 10% total drawdown, also requiring 5 minimum active trading days. **Instant Pro** offers 6% daily drawdown, 10% total drawdown, and a 70% profit split with 5 minimum active trading days.

Blueberry Funded also offers a **Synthetics Challenge** – unique to the firm – focused on custom volatility indices. Plus a **scaling plan** where every 3 months your account grows by 25% (up to $2M) if you hit 10% profit and complete 4 payouts.

Blueberry Funded scored 9.5/10 for Challenges reflecting its strong technical design, transparent drawdown limits, realistic profit targets, and fair entry costs.
categorySections.spreads:
Blueberry Funded offers raw spreads from **0.1 pips** and a flat **$7 round-turn** commission on forex and gold. Crypto, indices, and commodities have no commission, while stocks carry a **$2 per lot** commission.

Forex spreads are competitive: EUR/USD at **0.2 pips** (industry avg 0.22), AUD/USD at **0.1 pips** (industry avg 0.46), GBP/USD at **0.2 pips** (industry avg 0.52). USD/CAD (1.2 pips) and USD/JPY (0.6 pips) are slightly above industry averages.

Blueberry Funded keeps costs low with tight forex spreads and simple, fixed pricing, supporting its strong 9/10 spreads score.
categorySections.markets:
Blueberry Funded gives you access to **1,100+ instruments** across forex, crypto, indices, commodities, stocks, and synthetics. The inclusion of synthetic indices with constant volatility and unique tick behaviour sets it apart from most prop firms.

**Forex**: 45 pairs with up to 50:1 leverage. **Indices**: 14 instruments at 1:10. **Commodities**: 17 instruments at 1:10. **Crypto**: 52 assets at 1:2. **Stocks**: 1,000+ US stock CFDs at 1:10 (available through the Stock Challenge, not all challenge types). **Synthetics**: 12 custom indices at 1:30.

With over 1,100 instruments and the unique addition of synthetics, Blueberry Funded earns a perfect 10/10 in this area.
categorySections.platforms:
Blueberry Funded gives you access to four platforms – **MT4**, **MT5**, **DXTrade**, and **TradeLocker**. MT4 and MT5 provide advanced features and EA support, while TradeLocker delivers a smooth mobile experience with a clean interface. DXTrade is functional but basic.

Platform availability varies by challenge: MT4 is available on 1 Step, 2 Step, and Rapid. MT5 and TradeLocker are available on all challenge types including Stocks. DXTrade is available on 1 Step, 2 Step, and Rapid.

We scored Blueberry Funded 9/10 for platforms after testing execution speed, layout, and tools across all four options.
categorySections.payouts:
With Blueberry Funded you can withdraw profits on a **14-day payout cycle** with a minimum of **$100**. Payouts are handled through **RiseWorks** and settled in crypto (USDC or USDT). Profit splits start at **80%** and can increase to **90%** through the scaling plan after meeting performance conditions (10% net profit and 4 payouts within 3 months). Withdrawals are subject to a **30% consistency rule** – no more than 30% of total profit can come from a single trading day.

Challenge fees are paid via **crypto** (Bitcoin, stablecoins via Confirmo) or **credit/debit cards** (Visa, Mastercard) as a one-time upfront cost.

Blueberry Funded scores 9/10 for payments and payouts thanks to its clear, reliable system built around a predictable withdrawal cycle and fast crypto-based processing.
categorySections.support:
Blueberry Funded provides **24/5 customer support** via email and live chat. Their FAQ section is comprehensive. However, educational resources are limited – their YouTube has only a few dozen videos. The **Discord community** with 32,700+ members serves as the primary resource for trading insights.

While support is reliable, the firm could improve its educational offerings through stronger video content or structured learning resources.
categorySections.trust:
Blueberry Funded scores 9/10 for Trust thanks to its **ASIC-regulated** backing via Blueberry Markets, an active community, and membership in **The Prop Association** – a self-regulatory body focused on fairness and certification.

TrustPilot score is **3.8/5** from over 1,200 reviews. The **Discord community** has 32,700+ members, with 31,500 Instagram followers and 41,700 Twitter followers.

Their ASIC-regulated backing and founding membership in The Prop Association contribute to their strong trust score.

verdictBlocks.heading: Final Verdict on Blueberry Funded
verdictBlocks.body:
Blueberry Funded ranks as one of the top prop trading firms in 2026 with a score of 93/100, placing 3rd overall in our shortlist of the best prop firms. The firm is well rounded with low cost challenge fees, a wide range of tradable markets, and strong rule transparency. Drawdown limits vary by challenge type (from 2% to 5% daily and 4% to 10% total), so it's important to check the specific rules for the account you choose. During testing, we found consistent platform performance, reliable payouts, and a clear onboarding process, all contributing to high scores across key areas like Challenges (9.5/10), Markets (10/10), and Payouts (9/10).

Key rules to be aware of: news trading is prohibited (2-minute restriction around high-impact events), withdrawals are subject to a 30% consistency rule, and all trades must remain open for at least 5 minutes. Profit splits start at 80% and can scale to 90%. It's backed by a regulated forex broker and now a founding member of The Prop Association, making it a strong option if you're looking for reliable access to funded trading.

faq.a: Yes, Blueberry offers CFD and forex trading through Blueberry Markets. Visit compareforexbrokers.com, our primary site that has been operating for over 10 years and has evaluations of all the top brokers, including a Blueberry Markets review.

Yes, Blueberry Funded is a trustworthy prop trading firm supported by Blueberry Markets, a broker regulated by ASIC. The prop trading firm has a transparent challenge structure, with low fees starting at $25 and profit splits up to 90%. Payouts are processed every 14 days through RiseWorks, ensuring reliability.

Yes, Blueberry Funded is one of the best crypto prop firms with access to 52 cryptocurrency pairs, including BTC/USD, ETH/USD, and LTC/USD. Traders can trade 24/7 with a maximum leverage of 1:2, accommodating the volatility of crypto markets. This selection includes both major and smaller digital assets, providing flexibility for different trading strategies.

Yes, Blueberry Funded offers a scaling plan, allowing traders to increase their account balance by 25% every three months. To qualify, you must achieve a 10% net profit and process at least four payouts within the same period. You can scale your accounts up to a maximum simulated capital allocation of $2 million, as well as your profit split to 90%.
